# ansible-homelab-monitoring

Deploys Prometheus + Grafana against base_nodes and k8s_nodes via the foundation reusable workflow.

## Entrypoints
- site.yml installs prometheus/grafana/node_exporter.
- .github/workflows/deploy.yml calls foundation's reusable-deploy.yml.
